name: Amir
description:
There are worst things then death. But nothing is worse than being forced to breed with  your enemy whose a pompous little ass who thinks he’s better than you.

This boy is inspired by my favorite bot creator @Silly.J. Their farm bots are my favorite so I decided to make one of my own with a twist. Hope you guys like it. 

I made the art using NovelAi and procreate for add ons.
creator: JAEJAE6045
